text.title: Ramp Task Difficulty Ladder Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the product-dev team's onboarding cadence warrant a pinned, versioned ladder?

branch.question: Is the trigger event observable AND is there at least one prior ramp cycle with evidence (tickets, retro notes, PRs) to anchor the ladder?

branch.conclusion: Fill the full ladder using `templates/skeleton.md`. Use `r3-evidence-anchored` to attach evidence, `r4-named-owner` for the header, `r5-iteration-loop` to schedule the next outcome review.
Block. Resolve the trigger event (named, observable) and gather at least one cycle of evidence before filling the spec — vague triggers and unevidenced ladders decay into folklore.
Skip the methodology. Write a one-off onboarding doc instead; revisit when hiring cadence ≥3/year AND a named owner is appointed.

example.p: Product-dev team hired 4 devs last year, alice owns onboarding-runbook, last hire's ramp tickets are linked in retro #42. → warrants full ladder → conclusion r2-bounded-output.
